subject: [PATCH v6 13/20] nfsd: allow nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() to work with no export

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch allows the nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change function to work even when there is no export available, which can occur in certain CB_NOTIFY callback scenarios. The change ensures that a delegation will not be granted on the V4 root, making this safe. This modification enables the function to operate correctly without requiring access to an svc_export.
